name: Jalapeno Pepper Jelly
recipeIngredient: 1 large Green pepper, cut into quarters
2 Fresh jalapeno peppers, seeds and ribs removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dinely chop the green pepper and jalapeno peppers using a food processor or knife.
2. In a 1-1/2 quart Dutch oven, combine the chopped green pepper mixture, sugar, and vinegar.
3. Bring to boil on range-top; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer, stirring often, about 15 minutes or until the pepper mixture turns transparent.
5. Stir in pectin; add food coloring if desired.
6. Return to full rolling boil; boil hard, uncovered, for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
7. Remove from heat. Skim off any foam with a metal spoon.
8. Pour into hot sterilized half-pint jars, seal with metal lids and paraffin. Serve with cream cheese and assorted crackers.
